title: Boost AI context with hybrid search in Spanner
summary: Google Cloud presented hybrid search capabilities in Spanner that combine full-text and vector search for AI-powered retrieval-augmented generation applications. The tool integrates with Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to enable contextual, multi-model search over operational data.
writeup: This video covers hybrid search in Spanner, which combines full-text and vector search for retrieval-augmented generation applications. It matters because operational data already lives in Spanner, and combining keyword and semantic retrieval improves the context supplied to AI systems. The key takeaways: the hybrid approach pairs full-text and vector search, and it integrates with the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform to support contextual, multi-model search over operational data.
